title: CreativeManifest
description: Approved creative manifest produced by the creative service and consumed by the player. ICD-5 contract. Player must render only manifests that have been approved. Unapproved or missing manifests must be rejectable without blanking playback.

manifest_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this manifest version. Referenced by player-command activate_creative payloads.

approved_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when this manifest was approved.

approved_by.description: Identifier of the operator who approved this manifest.

expires_at.description: Optional UTC RFC 3339 timestamp after which this manifest must not be rendered. If absent, the manifest does not expire.

items.description: Ordered list of creative items in this manifest. Must contain at least one item.

item_id.description: Stable identifier for this item within the manifest.

asset_id.description: Identifier of the approved asset to render. Must resolve to an asset the player has cached or can fetch.

duration_ms.description: Target display duration for this item, in milliseconds. For video assets, this is advisory; the asset's natural duration takes precedence.

loop.description: If true and asset_type is video, the asset should loop for the full duration_ms. Default false.

policy.description: Optional rendering policy modifiers. Constrains how the player may apply this manifest.

min_dwell_ms.description: Minimum time the player must display this manifest before a switch command may be accepted.

cooldown_ms.description: Minimum time after this manifest completes before it may be reactivated.

allow_interruption.description: If false, the player must complete the full manifest play-through before accepting the next activate_creative command. Default true.
